errorMessage.description: A collection of error messages for individual properties in the schema. Okta implements a subset of [ajv-errors](https://github.com/ajv-validator/ajv-errors).

oneOf.description:
Non-empty array of valid JSON schemas.

Okta only supports `oneOf` for specifying display names for an `enum`. Each schema has the following format:

```
{
  "const": "enumValue",
  "title": "display name"
}
```

title.description: The display label for the enumerated value

pattern.description: For `string` log stream schema property type, specifies the regular expression used to validate the property

required.description: Required properties for this log stream schema object

title.description: Name of the log streaming integration

type.description: Type of log stream schema property

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
